title: $PGR stock?
author: FreelanceJournalist9
selftext: Hi! My name is Genna Contino and I'm a freelance reporter writing about Progressive outpacing the S&P 500 this year and am looking to speak with investors. If you've bought or sold $PGR in the past year - I'd love to chat with you via phone interview for the story! Message or email me at gennac07@gmail.com.
